landing.announcement: Dikgang tsa Bosheng: Sedirisiwa sa go latela diente sa se se ntshwa se a dira.

hero.title: Go matlafatsa
hero.subtitle: Barui ba Botswana.
hero.description: Tsamaiso e e tletseng ya matshwao le telehealth ya dingaka, e e diretsweng go bereka gongwe le gongwe—tota le kwantle ga inthanete.

cta.title: A o ipaakanyeditse go fetola polasi ya gago?
cta.subtitle: Kopana le diketekete tsa balemi ba ba setseng ba dirisa Farm-Aid go tokafatsa ditiro le botsogo jwa diruiwa.

features.title: Sengwe le sengwe se o se tlhokang
features.subtitle: Didirisiwa tse di maatla tse di diretsweng dintlha tsa temothuo kwa magaeng

feature1.title: Offline-First
feature1.desc: Laola ditshwao tsa gago kwantle ga inthanete. E ikamanya gape fa o bona inthanete.

feature2.title: Smart Diagnostics
feature2.desc: AI mo sedirisiweng go lemoga malwetse mo diruiweng go tswa mo matshwaong kgotsa dinepe.

feature3.title: Telehealth Portal
feature3.desc: Ikgolaganye le dingaka tsa diphologolo tse di tlhaga go bona thuso ya ka nako.

field.title: E diretse go bereka mo nageng.
field.desc: Go tswa kwa Okavango go ya kwa Kalahari, Farm-Aid e a itshoka. UI e e nonofeng le tiriso e e kwa tlase ya betiri.
field.point2: Ditshwao tsa botsogo tse di babalesegileng
field.point3: Go ikgolaganya le ngaka ka nako ya potlako

footer.description: Go aga maranyane a segompieno a temothuo a a nonofeng mo Botswana le go feta.
